phases.name: Roadmap Re-Grounding
phases.scope: Re-read Sideport config, SDD plan, contract, UI instructions, code seams, working tree, and specialist reviews.

phases.name: Full Roadmap Contract
phases.scope: ADR and canonical contract for known devices, upload/import, workspace capabilities, operations worker, diagnostics.
phases.result: Completed after one revision; judge PASS.

phases.name: Known Devices Backend
phases.scope: Durable known-device JSON store, endpoints, reachable merge, tests.
phases.result: Completed after one revision; judge PASS.

phases.name: Upload Import Backend
phases.scope: Multipart IPA upload/import into durable catalog, validation/conflict tests.
phases.result: Completed after one revision; judge PASS.

phases.name: Workspace Capability Backend
phases.scope: Live read contract for current member, roles, capabilities, delegated limits.
phases.result: Completed; judge PASS with minor close-outs applied.

phases.name: Background Operations Backend
phases.scope: Queued refresh worker, cancel queued, retry/rerun new operations, scheduler enqueue.
phases.result: Completed after one revision; judge PASS.

phases.name: Durable Diagnostics Backend
phases.scope: Grouped issue store from real evidence, issue endpoints, triage transitions.
phases.result: Completed after one revision; judge PASS.

phases.name: Admin UI Bindings
phases.scope: Bind current admin surfaces plus Operations page to backend contracts.
phases.result: Completed after three revisions; judge PASS.

phases.name: Merge/Deploy Readiness
phases.scope: Docs, IaC plan-only evidence, final gates, run validation, merge/deploy handoff.
phases.result: Completed; all gates pass, no live apply performed.
